requirements.title: BFT-008

requirements.activation_gate: section-specific activation gate; no Mainnet-blocking waiver
requirements.normative_sentence: Validator-set activation SHALL fail closed when independence or diversity requirements are not met, even when the raw validator count satisfies the BFT minimum. LAUNCH GATED Public validator joining, public validator safety, and public multi-validator BFT readiness remain NO-GO pending independent evidence. Repository evidence: README.md Candidate 3.11 controlling clarification: all consensus v2.0 First Draft comparisons use LogicalView(epoch, view), the old validator set alone finalizes the epoch-transition block, and the only cross-epoch QC exception is the handoff QC described in Section 81. Hash-based proposer selection has no production authority.
requirements.owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby - WeAll Protocol Maintainer

requirements.title: ECO-206

requirements.activation_gate: section-specific activation gate; no Mainnet-blocking waiver
requirements.normative_sentence: Economics SHALL not activate before finalized height 388,800 and SHALL remain disabled indefinitely until governance approval, conservation tests, replay equivalence, treasury evidence, failure recovery, legal review, security review, and applicable SLO gates pass. Balances, transfers, fees, issuance, rewards, treasury spending, storage payouts, and economic slashing SHALL activate together as one coordinated economic system. The production genesis state sets economics_enabled=false and public_mainnet_enabled=false. The repository README explicitly denies live-economics readiness.
requirements.owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby - WeAll Protocol Maintainer

requirements.title: FREEZE-002

requirements.activation_gate: section-specific activation gate; no Mainnet-blocking waiver
requirements.normative_sentence: Conflicting clauses at the same authority level make the affected capability launch-gated until an authorized specification correction resolves the conflict; implementations may not choose silently. Authority dimension Controlling artifact Meaning Chain-identity permanence Genesis Declaration commitment Immutable historical commitment and chain identity. Pre-testnet normative authority This controlling PDF Controls normative interpretation until matching public authorization and constitutional activation. Future operative normative authority Active Constitution Becomes the highest operative rights and governance authority after valid activation. Machine enforcement authority Activated transaction, state, parameter, and invariant contracts Rules every compliant node must apply at the current height. Amendment authority Constitutionally valid electorate and amendment process May replace future Active Constitution or machine contracts at a deterministic height. Execution authority SYSTEM receipts, validator certificates, elected emissaries, and opted-in responsibilities May execute only the exact capability granted by active rules.
requirements.owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby - WeAll Protocol Maintainer

requirements.activation_gate: section-specific activation gate; no Mainnet-blocking waiver

requirements.owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby - WeAll Protocol Maintainer

requirements.title: VOTE-008

requirements.activation_gate: section-specific activation gate; no Mainnet-blocking waiver
requirements.normative_sentence: The activated ballot profile SHALL specify exact post-quantum primitive identifiers, canonical encodings, one-time unlinkable ballot authorization, choice encryption or commitment, eligibility and uniqueness proof, threshold tally or decryption, publicly verifiable shuffle or aggregate proof, receipt- resistance analysis, and deterministic test vectors.

requirements.title: VOTE-009

requirements.activation_gate: section-specific activation gate; no Mainnet-blocking waiver
requirements.normative_sentence: Each ballot instance SHALL use a proposal-specific key ceremony with five independently controlled tally trustees and a 3-of-5 completion threshold. Trustee selection, public keys, commitments, proofs, exclusions, replacement shares, and destruction or retirement receipts SHALL be public and deterministic.
requirements.owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby - WeAll Protocol Maintainer

requirements.title: VOTE-010

requirements.activation_gate: section-specific activation gate; no Mainnet-blocking waiver
requirements.normative_sentence: No plaintext choice or identity-choice link may be revealed before or after closure. Partial trustee shares, invalid proofs, duplicate credentials, and early-decryption attempts SHALL fail closed and emit public failure evidence without exposing choices.
requirements.owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby - WeAll Protocol Maintainer

requirements.title: VOTE-011

requirements.activation_gate: section-specific activation gate; no Mainnet-blocking waiver
requirements.normative_sentence: When a valid tally proof cannot be produced by the deterministic completion deadline, the ballot SHALL produce no political outcome and SHALL enter a fresh-vote process under a new key ceremony; plaintext fallback, trustee discretion, and local recount authority are prohibited.
requirements.owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby - WeAll Protocol Maintainer

requirements.activation_gate: section-specific activation gate; no Mainnet-blocking waiver
requirements.normative_sentence: Ballot-profile activation SHALL require two independent interoperable implementations, independent cryptographic and metadata-correlation review, adversarial coercion and receipt tests, cross-machine deterministic replay, and a constitutional 30,240-block activation delay.
